title: Calling Dr. Kildare
writer: Harry Ruskin, Willis Goldbeck, Max Brand
actors: Lew Ayres, Lionel Barrymore, Laraine Day
plot: Dr. Gillespie tries to teach Jimmy Kildare a lesson by tossing him into a street clinic. Only Kildare gets called to take a bullet out of a suspected murderer, and when the cops collar him for it, he has to try and prove his patie...
